message:
fix(jit): Use `which zig` to find compiler in CI environments

The JIT compilation was failing in CI because the hardcoded zig paths
didn't match where mlugg/setup-zig installs zig. Now we:
1. First try `which zig` which properly inherits PATH from parent process
2. Fall back to hardcoded common locations if `which` fails
3. Inherit PATH from parent environment for child process

This enables JIT to work in GitHub Actions CI where zig is dynamically
installed and added to PATH by setup actions.
